critical.mandate: Follow standard pitch deck structure: Problem, Solution, Market, Model, Traction, Team, Ask
Every data point must be specific and credible
The ask must be clear and justified

step.title: Pitch Context
step.action: Define audience: investors, partners, internal stakeholders
Identify funding stage or purpose: seed, series A, partnership, internal buy-in
Define the key ask: funding amount, partnership terms, resource allocation

step.title: Load Business Artifacts
step.action: Read {planning_artifacts}/product-brief.md if available
Read market research artifacts if available
Read innovation strategy artifacts if available
Extract key data points, metrics, and competitive insights

step.title: Standard Pitch Structure
step.action: Plan slides following standard structure:
Cover — Company name, tagline, logo
Problem — Pain point with evidence (market data, quotes)
Solution — How you solve it, unique approach
Market — TAM, SAM, SOM with credible sources
Business Model — Revenue model, pricing, unit economics
Traction — Metrics, growth, milestones (or roadmap if pre-traction)
Team — Key team members, relevant experience, advisors
Ask — Specific funding/partnership ask with use of funds

step.title: Slide-by-Slide Content
step.action: For each required slide, create: headline, key message, supporting data, visual spec
Include speaker notes for each slide
Add appendix slides for detailed financials, tech architecture, competitive matrix

step.title: Data Visualization
step.action: Design charts for market size, growth trajectory, revenue projections
Create comparison tables for competitive positioning
Specify chart types, colors, and labeling for each data visualization

step.title: Storytelling Polish
step.action: Ensure narrative flow from problem through solution to opportunity
Add emotional beats: urgency (problem), relief (solution), excitement (market)
Craft compelling opening hook and closing call to action

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate pitch deck with: audience context, slide-by-slide content with speaker notes, data visualization specs, visual design system, and appendix slides.
